issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' (card is played), not 'Activated' (manual ability activation). The DSL describes a DON!! cost ability, which is triggered when the card enters play.
Condition should check if Leader 'is' or 'has type' Sanji, not search board for a card named Sanji. Use 'LeaderIsName' or 'LeaderHasAnyType' with value 'Sanji'.
Action should be 'PlayFromHand' or 'ActivateEffect' (to activate the Main effect of an Event in trash), not 'SearchDeck'. The effect activates an Event card already in trash, not searching deck.
Filter is incorrect. Should target Event cards in trash with cost ≤7, not deck cards by cost.
Text contains '[Your Turn]' prefix, indicating the effect is only usable during your turn. Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn', not Permanent.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Your Turn] [On Play] DON!! −1: If your Leader is [Sanji], activate the [Main] effect of up to 1 Event card with a cost of 7 or less in your trash.
